name: DUPHASTON 10MG 1*10TAB
description: A prescription-only hormonal medicine containing Dydrogesterone, used for managing female reproductive cycle conditions when natural progesterone levels are insufficient.
dosage: Prescription-dependent; varies by medical condition. Always follow your doctor's prescription exactly.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place at room temperature (below 30°C). Keep in original blister pack.

name: OVRAL-L TAB
description: Oral contraceptive pill used to prevent pregnancy by preventing egg release and limiting sperm movement.
dosage: One tablet daily for 21 consecutive days, followed by a 7-day tablet-free interval; swallow whole with water.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C in a clean and dry place. Keep away from children and pets.

name: UNWANTED-72 TAB
description: Emergency contraceptive designed to prevent unwanted pregnancy after unprotected intercourse or contraceptive failure.
uses: Prevents unplanned pregnancies after unprotected sexual contact
dosage: Single tablet taken as soon as possible, within 72 hours of intercourse.
sideEffects: Stomach upset with bloating, nausea, abdominal cramps
Spotting or vaginal bleeding before expected menstruation
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, away from direct sunlight and moisture.

name: I PILL
description: Emergency contraceptive used to help prevent unwanted pregnancy after contraceptive failure or unprotected intercourse.
uses: Prevent unintended pregnancy after unprotected intercourse
Emergency backup when regular contraception fails
Make uterine lining less suitable for implantation
dosage: Take one tablet as soon as possible, not later than 72 hours after unprotected sex, with food.
storageInstructions: Keep away from light and moisture, in a cool and dry place.

name: METHERGIN TAB 1*10
description: A uterine stimulant containing methyl ergometrine used after childbirth to prevent or stop uterine bleeding.
uses: Control of uterine bleeding after childbirth
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor; swallow whole with water.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C in a cool and dry place. Keep out of reach of children and pets.

name: VIAGRA 50MG TAB 1*2TAB
description: Used in men to treat erectile dysfunction. Relaxes blood vessels in the penis and improves blood flow during sexual arousal.
dosage: Take approximately one hour before sexual activity. Maximum one dose per day.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool, clean, and dry place, away from direct sunlight.

name: MODULA 10 TAB 1*10
description: Used for the treatment of erectile dysfunction and benign prostate hyperplasia (BPH) in men by enhancing blood flow.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor approximately one hour before sexual activity.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.

name: MODULA 5 MG 1*10
description: Used for the treatment of erectile dysfunction and benign prostate hyperplasia (BPH) in men by enhancing blood flow.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor approximately one hour before sexual activity.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.

name: VYMADA 50MG 1*14TAB
description: Medication combining sacubitril and valsartan used to manage chronic heart failure.
uses: Long-term management of weakened heart function
Reduction of excess body fluid accumulation
dosage: Prescribed individually by physician; available as 50mg tablets in strips of 14.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature and away from light. Keep in original package to protect from moisture.

name: MANFORCE 50 TAB 1*9
description: Prescription medicine for erectile dysfunction (impotence) in men that enhances blood flow to achieve or sustain an erection.
dosage: One tablet approximately one hour before sexual activity; maximum once per 24-hour period.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.
